sourceDesc.p: Derived from CDSL MW, PWG, PWK, AP90, GRA, and FRI source records for interoperability analysis.

projectDesc.p: tei-archival-profile-v0.1; TEI is used as the archival/textual model. Raw CDSL records are preserved as escaped source-entry quotes, while selected lexical structures are promoted into TEI entry, form, sense, citation, and relation elements.

revisionDesc.change: Included in the full machine-reviewed TEI profile.

sense.note: No stable machine definition could be extracted; source record is preserved in cit/quote.

listBibl.head: Machine-extracted citation index; source quotes preserve the archival text.

<L>15299<pc>0561-a<k1>dA<k2>dA {#dA#}¦ {vI.v} {c1c} <ab>P.</ab> [{#yacCati, datta#}] To give, grant. --WITH {#prati#} to exchange; <lbinfo n="ti#leByaH"/> {#tileByaH prati yacCati mAzAn#} <ls>Sk.</ls> {vII.v} {c2c} <ab>P.</ab> ({#dAti#},) To cut; {#dadAti#} <lbinfo n="dra#viRaM"/> {#draviRaM BUri dAti dAridryamarTinAM#} <ls>K.R.</ls> {vIII.v} {c4c} <ab>P.</ab> ({#dAyati#}) To bind (?). {vIV.v} {c3c} <ab>U.</ab> ({#dadAti, datte; dadO-dade#}, <lbinfo n="adAt-a#dita"/> {#adAt-adita, dAsyati-te, dAtuM, datta#}; but with {#A#} the {%<ab>p. p.</ab>%} is {#Atta#}; with {#upa, upAtta#}; with [Page0561-b+ 57] {#ni, nidatta#} or {#nItta#}, and with {#pra, pradatta#} or {#pratta#}) {@1@} To give, grant, bestow, offer, yield, impart, present (usually with <ab>acc.</ab> of the thing and <ab>dat.</ab>, <lbinfo n="some+times"/> sometimes <ab>gen.</ab> or <ab>loc.</ab> also, of the <lbinfo n="per+son"/> person); {#avakASaM kilodanvAn#} <lbinfo n="rAmAyABya#rTito"/> {#rAmAyAByarTito dadO#} <ls>R. 4. 58</ls>; {#secanaGawEH#} <lbinfo n="bAlapA#dapaByeH"/> {#bAlapAdapaByeH payo dAtumita evABivartate#} <ls>Ś. 1</ls>; <ls>Ms. 3. 31</ls>, <ls n="Ms.">9. 271</ls>; {#kaTamasya stanaM#} <lbinfo n="dA#sye"/> {#dAsye#} <ls>Hariv.</ls> {@--2@} To pay (as debt, fine &c.). {@--3@} To hand or deliver over. {@--4@} To restore, return. {@--5@} To give up, sacrifice, surrender; {#prARAm dA#} to sacrifice one's life; so {#AtmAnaM dA#} to sacrifice oneself. {@--6@} To put, place, apply, plant; {#karRe karaM dadAti#} &c. {@--7@} To give in marriage; {#yasmE dadyAt pitA#} {#tvenAM#} <ls>Ms. 5. 151</ls>; <ls>Y. 2. 146</ls>, <ls n="Y.">3. 24.</ls> {@--8@} To allow, permit (usually with <ab>inf.</ab>); {#bAzpastu na dadAtyenAM drazwuM#} <lbinfo n="citragatA#mapi"/> {#citragatAmapi#} <ls>Ś. 6. 21.</ls> The meanings of this root may be variously modified or extended according to the noun with which it is connected; {#mano dA#} to think, direct the mind to <lbinfo n="any+thing"/> anything; {#nItO mano dIyate#} <ls>Mu. 2. 5</ls>; {#avakASaM dA#} to give place to, make room; (see {#avakASa#}); {#karRaM dA#} to give ear to or listen; {#darSanaM dA#} to show oneself to, grant audience to; {#SabdaM#} {#dA#} to make a noise; {#tAlaM dA#} to clap the hands; {#AtmAnaM KedAya dA#} to <lbinfo n="ex+pose"/> expose oneself to trouble; {#Atape dA#} to expose to the sun's heat; {#AjYAM#}, <lbinfo n="ni#deSaM"/> {#nideSaM dA#} to issue orders, command; {#ASizaM dA#} to pronounce a blessing; {#cakzuH, dfzwiM dA#} to cast a glance, see; {#vAcaM dA#} to address a speech to; {#prativacaH, --vacanaM#} or {#pratyuttaraM dA#} to give reply; {#SokaM dA#} to cause grief; {#SrAdDaM#} {#dA#} to perform a Śrāddha; {#mArgaM dA#} to make way for, allow to pass, stand out of the way; {#varaM dA#} to grant a boon; {#saMgrAmaM dA#} to fight; {#argalaM dA#} to bolt, fasten or secure with a latch; {#nigaqaM dA#} to put in chains, fetter; <lbinfo n="saM#ketaM"/> {#saMketaM dA#} to make an appointment; {#SApaM#} {#dA#} to curse; {#vfttiM dA#} to enclose, fence in; {#agniM, pAvakaM dA#} to set on fire, &c. &c. {%--<ab>Caus.</ab>%} ({#dApayati-te#}) To cause to give, grant, &c. {%--<ab>Desid.</ab>%} ({#ditsati-te#}) To wish to give, &c. <LEND>

<L>2986<pc>128<k1>dA<k2>dA I √dā dadāti, datte, pp. datta, -˚ tta (ātta) <div n="1"/>1 <lang n="czech">dávati, poskytovati, nabízeti (sedadlo), darovati; vydávati, podávati; pokládati, dělati, tvořiti; dávati v manželství (provdávati); platiti; dovolovati</lang> <div n="1"/>2 <lang n="russian">давать, предоставлять, предлагать (сесть), подарить; выдавать, подавать; класть, делать, создавать; давать в брак (выдавать замуж); платить; разрешать</lang> <div n="1"/>3 <lang n="english">to give, impart, offer (a seat), bestow; give up, give over, surrender; put, place, make, create; give in marriage; to pay (as debt); permit, allow</lang> <LEND>
